S.FORM: Herb Bonn sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1916, ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 1, Herb Bonn, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1943) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: Д§erОІ ОІonn s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, wal malaxmis~Й•uq qanij la. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj *, Д§erОІ ОІonn, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. (mД§uqil s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
